Doris Dragovińá ‚Äď Sna'ńáu se ja

Skidan sve sa srca
Ň°ta mu ne triba,
ko je lud pa bi prid neba sud
izmańáane duŇ°e...

Ne viruje mi se
drugin judima,
iman ja svoju viru i miru
od jubavi...

Iden po svome
u svitlu tvome...

Sna'ńáu se ja
i slidit svoj put,
i da razbije me grom
iden tebi di je dom...

Ja samo znan
da smo zemlja i cvit,
di jubav stanuje,
niko neńáe ostarit...

Ň†ta je to za mene
dignit praŇ°inu,
uvik je boje gurat vitar
nego tiŇ°inu...

Iden po svome
u svitlu tvome...

#DorisDragovic #SnacuSeJa

snippet.title: BAKAPRASE - OBI (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
INSTAGRAM: https://www.instagram.com/bakaprase/‚Äč
Ň†AIM SE. brend USKORO: https://saimse.com/‚Äč
SPOTIFY: uskoro...
DEEZER: uskoro...

Tekst: @BakaPrase 
Muzika: BakaPrase
AranŇĺman: @jonezr9 @bogi_batina
mix/master: @bogi_batina

Kamera: @nedeljkovicvuk - Debbug
Directed by: BakaPrase, Debbug
Video Edit & Post Production: Debbug - @nedeljkovicvuk

Hvala horu "ńĆarolija" Ň°to su otpevali najllepŇ°e na svetu.

Artwork: Djoxa Designs - @_djoxa_

tekst:

bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


sedim nemam plan iz sata u sat
cekam samo kad ce proci dan

al onda cujem glas to je mali pas
nije tigar ali je bas gas

ooo blenta kada gleda me
ooo na osmeh tera me
ooo ooo
presladak je
pisa na uglu svakom

trcimo po keju
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu 
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan


i kada stanem u zutu lokvu poludim
posle hrane je svuda sranje po kuci

krevet zapisan govna pun je stan
mali je al sere kilogram

napolju me blam dok govna sakupljam
zapitam se dal je normalan

ooo govna blato gazi sve
ooo pa onda sapom mazi me
ooo ooo
pa batinice
novina puca jako

trcimo po snegu
trcimo kroz park
trcimo po blatu 
svaki dan  

trcimo po knezu
trcimo kroz grad
trcimo po stanu
svaki dan


ref x 2
bili su tuzni dani i bolelo je
on mi je uso u zivot i promenio me

al sad sta god da se desi necu ostati sam
i zato hvala ti mali s tobom sam presrecan

snippet.title: Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
'Prince Harry and William Walk Together as Royal Family Departs Prince Philip's Funeral'

Prince William and his brother, Prince Harry, were seen walking together through the grounds of Windsor Castle following the funeral of their grandfather, Prince Philip, the Duke of Edinburgh, on Saturday.

snippet.title: Prince Philip's funeral: the key moments
snippet.description:
The funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh has taken place at St George's Chapel in Windsor.

The Queen led her family in mourning her husband of 73 years.

The service was led by the Dean of Windsor, who paid tribute to Prince Philip's "kindness, humour and humanity" - as well as his "unwavering loyalty" to Her Majesty.

Sky's Jason Farrell looks at how the funeral unfolded.

snippet.title: Queen arrives at chapel for Prince Philip's funeral service
snippet.description:
The Queen arrives at St George's Chapel, where she is greeted by the Dean of Windsor, the Right Reverend David Conner.

Prince Philip's coffin is followed by senior royals, including the Prince of Wales, Princess Royal, and Princes William and Harry.

As the Covid 19 vaccine rolls out, 
big questions loom.

still spread the disease? 

Lockdown ko knockdown
Djogani is in the house
With a brand new sound
No money no, no business
Put your mask on 
and keep the distance
Lockdown nervous breakdown
Fucking virus is flying around
We gotta move, move
we have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

Svetom vlada ńćudna epidemija
ńĆekaj, hani, hani,
Daj molim te ne drami
Svuda piŇ°e LOCK DOWN,
VidiŇ° na naslovnoj strani
A, ti bi, moja habibi,
Da te vodim u Dubai, a posle Karibi
Nemoj sada kada pukla je estrada,
Nema putovanja, nema Gucci, nema Prada

Santorini,
Masku skini, hajde ljubi me
Baci ńćini, 
Da sve opet bude kao pre
Uzmi ruku pa me vodi
I pozovi muziku za sto
Da zajedno zoru ńćekamo
Da me grliŇ° hońáu jako
Kako ako si na metar-dva
Moja ljubav nije zarazna

Lockdown nervus breakdown
Fuckin virus is flyin around
We gotta move, move
We have to dance
Reach for the stars
Idemo na Mars

SluŇ°aj malo doktore na vestima
Ň†ta ńáe dalje biti baŇ° me zanima
ńĆekaj, hani, hani, da prońĎu ovi dani
Ludilo preti planeti,
Budimo kod mene sami
A ti bi, moja habibi,
Opet svuda po Evropi nastupe na bini
JoŇ° samo malo, evo ja ti dajem reńć
Punińćemo opet Cirih, Dizeldorf i Beńć.
 
Ref.

Ma, nema stani-pani
Tu je ńźole ńźogani
Idemo na Mars, pun je gas, 
Samo masku stavi
Ritam te radi, radi
super je Ň°to smo sami,
Ne moŇĺemo vani
Zato dońĎi meni, mami, mami

Ako ti je dosadno ti snimaj Tik Tok
Neka gleda sever, zapad, jug i istok
Sve dok imaŇ° mene ne treba ti niko
Sa mnom si na sigurnom.

snippet.title: Kate and Camilla arrive at Duke of Edinburgh's funeral
snippet.description:
The Duchess of Cambridge and the Duchess of Cornwall arrive for the funeral of the Duke of Edinburgh at Windsor Castle.

The Queen and her family gathered to say farewell to the Duke of Edinburgh, who died just over a week ago at Windsor.

Kate Middleton arrived at St George‚Äôs Chapel wearing a pearl necklace known as the Four-Row Japanese Pearl Choker.

The necklace was loaned to Kate by the Queen from the Royal Collection after it was given to Her Majesty by the Japanese Government.

Kate previously wore the statement necklace in 2017 at a dinner to commemorate the 70th wedding anniversary of Prince Philip and the Queen.

Read more here: https://www.independent.co.uk/life-style/royal-family/prince-philip-funeral-kate-middleton-pearl-necklace-meaning-b1833126.html

snippet.description:

Spotify: uskoro...
Deezer: uskoro...

Tekst/Lyrics:

Poceo od nule vidi gde sam tada bio
Igrao sam igru ko da bila je kazino
Kido
Zajedno smo jaki ko Vegito
Preuzimam scenu nece me spreciti niko  (x2)

Al put je dug znaj da cimo sam se kao nikad pre
Nisam znao nista al u glavi imao sam sve
Laptop, daska , krevet, kamera ja jurim svoje sne
To sam ja GUH SAJAN koji ne odustaje

Bio slep
Nisam znao ko pravi drugar je
Mnogo njih se pravi da to jesu, a mnogi su fejk
Svako gleda svoju korist i to gadi mi se eeej
Moram nositi se stime moram paziti na sve

Ja sam gladan uspeha i idem sada ka svom snu
Sujeta ih jede i to ne mogu da prikriju
Maska dole, Maska gore lica manjaju vam se
Polecem polecem, gore zvezde zovu me

Najgore je to sto ljude vidis samo kao broj
Neki gledaju te i pisu ti kako nisi svoj
Vremenom tek vide kolko to pogresna je vest
JEDAN JE GUH SAJAN I NE POSTOJI COPY PASTE

snippet.title: Podcast Inkubator #590 - Marko i Hambi
snippet.description:
https://www.facebook.com/XiaomiHrvatska

Tlo se nakon razornog potresa u srediŇ°njoj Hrvatskoj zatreslo viŇ°e od 1000 puta.
Svako novo podrhtavanje tla donosi novi nemir, a slińćan efekt u ovim napetim vremenima moŇĺe izazvati i vibracija mobitela.
Zato ugasi vibru i preuzmi Smirilicu, umirujuńáu melodiju zvona nastalu smirivanjem vibracija samog potresa.
Smiri sebe i okolinu, preuzmi Smirilicu i doniraj za potresom pogońĎena podruńćja, a viŇ°e saznaj ovdje: https://www.cinipravustvar.hr/smirilica 

Na crveni kauńć stiŇĺe jedan od najpopularnijih gostiju u Podcast Inkubatoru - poznati boksańćki i MMA trener, ali i legenda naŇ°ih druŇ°tvenih mreŇĺa, Goran Babińá - Hamby. On i Petrak ńáe analizirati sve aktualno na borilańćkoj sceni, te ńáe ekskluzivno najaviti i novi projekt koji bi od 1.5. trebao krenuti na kanalu Podcast Inkubatora

snippet.title: Queen Arrives at Windsor Castle and Funeral Procession Begins
snippet.description:
Queen Elizabeth II and other members of the Royal Family, including Prince Charles, Prince Edward, Prince Andrew and Princess Anne, joined a procession on Saturday at Windsor Castle ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

The service will salute both his service in the Royal Navy and his support for Britain's monarch over three quarters of a century.

#Queen #PrincePhilip #Funeral

snippet.title: Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall Arrive For Prince Philip's Funeral
snippet.description:
Kate, the Duchess of Cambridge, Princess Beatrice and Zara Tindall were among the members of the Royal Family to arrive at Windsor Castle on Saturday ahead of the funeral for Prince Philip.

Because of coronavirus restrictions only 30 mourners will attend the funeral service, including Queen Elizabeth II, her four children and her eight grandchildren.

#KateMiddleton #PrincessBeatrice #RoyalFamily

snippet.description:
Built for handling the toughest driving conditions, Chonkers Off-Road Tires make getting around off road easier in any vehicle.

The Chonkers Off-Road Tires are the first Mod to arrive to the Fortnite Island. These tires are perfect for when you want to take the scenic route but don't want to sacrifice the smooth ride of your current vehicle. Find these tires on the ground or even in some tire piles around the Island.

Hop in, grab a pair of Chonkers Off-Road Tires and take it off road!

#FortniteChonkers #ChonkersOffRoadTires #Fortnite

snippet.title: UFC 260 Fight Timeline: Miocic vs Ngannou 2
snippet.description:
After their first fight in 2018, Stipe Miocic and Francis Ngannou went down different paths on the road to the rematch. Miocic became embroiled in a trilogy with Daniel Cormier, while Francis Ngannou overcame a disappointing performance at UFC 226 to put on an incredible streak of finishes. Don't miss Miocic vs Ngannou 2 on Saturday, March 27.

snippet.title: Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
snippet.description:
Twenty One Pilots - Shy Away (Official Video)
Twenty One Pilots official video for "Shy Away" from the forthcoming album Scaled And Icy, available May 21st on Fueled By Ramen.

Twenty One Pilots - Livestream Experience
May 21 @ 8PM ET / 5PM PT
Tickets available at http://live.twentyonepilots.com 

Stream / Download "Shy Away" - https://top.lnk.to/SAI
Pre-order / Pre-Save Scaled And Icy - https://top.lnk.to/SAI

Directed by Miles Cable & AJ Favicchio

LYRICS
When I get home,
You better not be there
We're placing bets you won't
Shed your modesty
And the only thing to leave behind
Is your own skin on the floor

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard
Don't you shh...

When you get home
You barely recognize the pictures they
put in a frame
'Cause you shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Take what you have
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

When I get home
Boy, you better not be there
You're long gone
Shed your modesty
Don't circle the track
Just break the cycle in half
and leave your skin on the floor.

Don't you shy away
Manifest a ceiling when you shy away
Searching for that feeling
Just like an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

that's never heard...

an 'I Love You'
That isn't words
Like a song he wrote
that's never heard

Don't you shy away.

snippet.title: Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
snippet.description:
Pratite nas na: http://bit.ly/PRVAsub
Dosije - Ljuba Zemunac 2. deo | PRVA
Sve epizode moŇĺete da pogledate ovde: https://bit.ly/Dosije

Nastavak prińće o Ljubi Zemuncu. 

Ekipa "Dosijea" prińća o vremenu ozbiljnih opasnih mangaŇ°a ńćiji postupci se i dan danas preprińćavaju. Na ńćelu ganga nalazio se jedan od najpoznatijih Ňĺestokih momaka sa naŇ°ih prostora, zańćetnik jugo mafije Ljubomir MagaŇ°, zvani Ljuba Zemunac. Na sam pomen njegovog imena svi su strahovali. Pravińćan, patriota pomalo preke naravi reŇ°avao je situacije u hodu. Za prijatelje anńĎeo ńćuvar dok je za ove druge bio nońána mora, a gnev i jańćinu njegove pesnice neprijatelji su odlińćno pamtili. ŇĹivotni put Ljubomira MagaŇ°a i druŇĺine koju je okupio oko sebe, moŇĺe se porediti sa scenama holivudskog filma. Od bezbriŇĺnih deńćaka do ljudi sa poternica, od vila i luksuznih automobila do hladnih zatvorskih zidina, preko zlata i para do kovńćega. Saznańáemo na koje sve skrivene i javne nańćine je njegova ekipa operisala krimi krugovima i videti rekonstrukcije najbitnijih dogańĎaja iz njegovog Ňĺivota. ńĆuńáemo i svedońćanstva onih koji su ga poznavali, i sve to u stilu najuzbudljivijih dokumentaristińćkih akcionih filmova.

Posetite naŇ° sajt: http://www.prva.rs/
Lajkujte nas i na Fejsbuku: http://bit.ly/PRVAfb
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Instagramu: http://bit.ly/PRVAig
MoŇĺete nas pratiti i na Tviteru: http://bit.ly/PRVAtwitter

it.title: Dipingi le uova senza sostanze chimiche nel modo originale - abbastanza naturale
it.description:
La Pasqua si avvicina, quindi ecco il primo video di quest'anno per dipingere le uova. Dipingi le uova nel modo originale senza l'uso di prodotti chimici, abbastanza naturalmente.
